expectations.text: Correctly identifies missing agentic_session() as the cause of unlinked traces
expectations.evidence: Transcript explicitly states 'agentic_session() is absent' as Finding 2 and explains that without it each LLM call produces an unlinked trace — exactly the reported symptom.

expectations.text: Adds agentic_session() wrapping the agent call
expectations.evidence: diff adds 'async with kelet.agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id):' wrapping the entire _run_agent_stream body including the [DONE] sentinel in src/routers/chat.py.

expectations.text: Does not re-ask for API keys or project name already configured. Fixing a broken/wrong method is acceptable and does NOT count as redundant.
expectations.evidence: Transcript explicitly notes .env already has the correct keys and settings model already has the fields; no prompts for new keys or project name are issued. Adding kelet.configure() is a fix, not a re-ask.

expectations.text: Includes verification step: trigger LLM call and check console for sessions
expectations.evidence: Phase V checklist includes an unchecked smoke test item: 'trigger POST /chat → open Kelet console → verify session appears (allow a few minutes)'.
